creator: wilfre@mail.ru
text:
portupgrade'ing after today's (12 of March '09) portsnap caused porttools to be unable to upgrade some ports because of unavailability to install x11/libX11. Further investigation leaded to understanding the fact that if I uninstall 'bash-4.0.10' x11/libX11 builds successfully. So do dependant ports. Right now I can't include port build log, but I remember that error was at line 23 of file 'doltcompile'. I'll update as soon as I get port build log with error.

How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/shells/bash && make install clean && cd /usr/ports/x11/libX11 && make build
